examples: Such appendages betoken an understanding that words alone do not always suffice, especially when a message's purpose is to communicate its author's power and importance.
They betoken a time when artists regarded the natural landscape not just as a source of beauty, but as the visible evidence of divine order.
His performance over the demanding Epsom course on just his third start suggests there could be plenty more to come from a horse whose very name seems to betoken greatness.
